==Biography==
He first began playing League of Legends during the beta and had his first competitive gaming experience when he played in the first EPS season on the team Nimby Gaming. He began playing video games at the age of 6.

== Trivia ==
* His favorite champions include {{ci|Gragas}}, {{ci|Veigar}}, {{ci|Ziggs}}<ref>[http://www.reddit.com/r/leagueoflegends/comments/wyrd5/hi_im_citizenwayne_apmid_of_natus_vincere_staying/c5hn2dy Reddit Comment] ''reddit.com''</ref> and {{ci|Lux}}<ref>[http://www.reddit.com/r/leagueoflegends/comments/12e40a/hi_im_citizenwayne_ap_mid_of_team_acerwe_just/ Reddit Comment] ''reddit.com''</ref>.
* Growing up he wanted to be a banker because someone told him they make a lot of money.
* He always disliked playing Support.
* Was #3 on the EU West solo queue ladder during Season 1, at 2460 Elo.
